mapper.sql: id, name, title, brandId, description, feature, tags, price, isHero, isBanner, isRec, status, version, createTime, updateTime, isDelete

p.id, p.name, p.title, p.brandId, p.description, p.feature, p.tags, p.price, p.status, p.version, ( select pi.url from product_images pi where pi.productId = p.id order by pi.isMain desc, pi.sortOrder asc, pi.createTime asc limit 1 ) as url
mapper.select:
select
from product p where p.isRec = 1 and p.status = 1 and p.isDelete = 0 order by p.id desc limit 8

select
from product p where p.isHero = 1 and p.status = 1 and p.isDelete = 0 order by p.id desc limit 1

select
from product p where p.isBanner = 1 and p.status = 1 and p.isDelete = 0 order by p.id desc limit 5

select
from product p where p.id = #{productId} and p.status = 1 and p.isDelete = 0 limit 1
select id, productId, url, isMain, sortOrder, createTime from product_images where productId = #{productId} order by isMain desc, sortOrder asc, createTime asc

select c.id, c.name, c.parentId, c.icon, c.description, c.sortOrder, c.createTime, c.updateTime, c.isDelete from product_category pc inner join category c on c.id = pc.categoryId where pc.productId = #{productId} and c.isDelete = 0 order by c.sortOrder asc, c.createTime desc
select categoryId from product_category where productId = #{productId} order by id asc
select id, productId, skuCode, skuName, image, price, marketPrice, stock, lockStock, version, createTime, updateTime from product_skus where productId = #{productId} order by createTime asc, id asc

select
from product_category pc inner join product p on p.id = pc.productId where pc.categoryId = #{categoryId} and p.status = 1 and p.isDelete = 0 order by p.id desc

select p.id, p.name, p.title, p.tags, p.price, p.status, p.isHero, p.isBanner, p.isRec, p.createTime, p.updateTime, ( select pi.url from product_images pi where pi.productId = p.id order by pi.isMain desc, pi.sortOrder asc, pi.createTime asc limit 1 ) as mainUrl, ( select group_concat(distinct c.name separator ', ') from product_category pc2 inner join category c on c.id = pc2.categoryId and c.isDelete = 0 where pc2.productId = p.id ) as categoryNames, ( select count(*) from product_skus ps where ps.productId = p.id ) as skuCount from product p where p.isDelete = 0
and ( p.name like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or p.title like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or p.tags like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
and p.status = #{query.status}
and exists ( select 1 from product_category pc3 where pc3.productId = p.id and pc3.categoryId = #{query.categoryId} )
order by p.updateTime desc, p.id desc

select p.id, p.name, p.title, p.tags, p.description, p.price, p.status, ( select pi.url from product_images pi where pi.productId = p.id order by pi.isMain desc, pi.sortOrder asc, pi.createTime asc limit 1 ) as mainImageUrl, ( select group_concat(distinct c.name order by c.sortOrder asc separator ', ') from product_category pc inner join category c on c.id = pc.categoryId where pc.productId = p.id and c.isDelete = 0 ) as categoryNames, p.updateTime from product p where p.id = #{productId} and p.status = 1 and p.isDelete = 0 limit 1

select p.id, p.name, p.title, p.tags, p.description, p.price, p.status, ( select pi.url from product_images pi where pi.productId = p.id order by pi.isMain desc, pi.sortOrder asc, pi.createTime asc limit 1 ) as mainImageUrl, ( select group_concat(distinct c.name order by c.sortOrder asc separator ', ') from product_category pc inner join category c on c.id = pc.categoryId where pc.productId = p.id and c.isDelete = 0 ) as categoryNames, p.updateTime from product p where p.status = 1 and p.isDelete = 0 order by p.updateTime desc, p.id desc
